note: Model-neutral capability classes. Mapped to concrete models during runtime discovery; never hardcode a permanent model name in plans.

highest_reasoning.use: orchestration, architecture, adversarial grill, plan-consistency judging

balanced_reasoning.use: most planning agents and most implementation tasks

validation_independent.constraint: must be a separate context from the producer it evaluates

budgets.planning_context_budget: keep main thread to intent, decisions, requirements, open questions, synthesis
budgets.implementation_context_budget: supervisor gets metadata+status; workers get a focused context packet
budgets.external_service_budget: record calls in execution ledger; prefer mocks in local/test
